notes: Keeps The Tube TV Mode inside mpv during video and commercial transitions so the app/static screen does not flash between items.
Quietly replaces TV Mode media in the existing mpv session and suppresses transition overlays.
Improves The Tube TV Mode timing by learning real playback duration from mpv and correcting schedules when server duration metadata is missing.
Bumps server-backed episode fallback timing to avoid stale offsets replaying the same short after commercial breaks.
